seoDescription: J & W Foreign Auto Service in Sebastopol, CA — a family-run import auto shop specializing in air-cooled and water-cooled Volkswagens and other foreign vehicles. Honest diagnosis and repair on South Main Street. 4.8 stars across 27 reviews.
heroSubheading: J & W Foreign Auto Service is a family-run shop on South Main Street specializing in air-cooled and water-cooled Volkswagens and other imports — straightforward, honest work for Sonoma County drivers.
highlights: Family-run import auto shop in Sebastopol
aboutHeading: About J & W Foreign Auto Service
aboutBody: J & W Foreign Auto Service is a family-run repair shop at 401 S Main Street in Sebastopol, serving Sonoma County drivers who want their import vehicles cared for by people who know them inside and out. The shop has a particular love for Volkswagens — both classic air-cooled Bugs and Buses and modern water-cooled models.

Customers consistently describe the team as honest, knowledgeable and genuinely helpful, whether they are tracking down a pesky electrical fault or getting a beloved older VW back on the road. The shop holds a 4.8-star rating across 27 reviews.

services.title: Volkswagen Repair
services.description: Specialist service and repair for air-cooled and water-cooled Volkswagens, from classic Bugs and Buses to modern models.

services.title: Foreign & Import Repair
services.description: Diagnosis and repair across foreign and import makes by a shop that focuses on European and import vehicles.

services.title: Electrical Diagnosis
services.description: Tracking down and resolving tricky electrical faults that other shops struggle with.

services.title: General Service & Maintenance
services.description: Routine maintenance and repairs to keep your import running reliably.

testimonials.quote: Honest and knowledgeable — very helpful resolving a pesky electrical issue.
testimonials.author: Verified Yelp review · Sebastopol

notes: Verified via web research (Birdeye reviews.birdeye.com 4.8 stars/27 reviews; Yelp listing 12 reviews; ChamberOfCommerce.com 4.4 stars/26 reviewers; BBB profile exists; Facebook page facebook.com/JWForeignAuto). Website status: NO own domain — Facebook page is the only owned web presence; all other hits are directory listings (Yelp, Yellow Pages, Manta, Birdeye). Trust signal = verified 4.8 stars/27 reviews (Birdeye). Address 401 S Main St, Sebastopol 95472; (707) 823-9797; hours Mon–Fri 9–5 (Birdeye). The 'family run since 1967' and VW-specialist descriptions are self-reported across listings/Facebook — NOT officially documented, so 'established' left empty and the year is not asserted on-site. A review mentions 'new owners' improving the shop, so confirm current owner name before personalizing outreach. Photo-less build (no confirmed own photos). Testimonial quote condensed honestly from review snippets.
